seoTitle: Cambrai vs Camden Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cambrai and Camden Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cambrai vs Camden Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cambrai and Camden Park.
heading: Cambrai vs Camden Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cambrai, South Australia and Camden Park, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Camden Park has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Cambrai (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cambrai or Camden Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cambrai has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Camden Park scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cambrai scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Camden Park scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cambrai or Camden Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Camden Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
